title: The Wrong Question
excerpt: I spent years asking the wrong question. The right one was simpler, and scarier.

title: Subscriber Zero
excerpt: I asked an AI to name my game. It worked. That should probably bother me more than it does.

title: 66% Slay the Spire, 34% Darkest Dungeon
excerpt: Two games. One ratio. And an ongoing argument with myself about whether I'm making the right call.
